exists x.(exists y.(((Musician(x) -> Love(x, music)) & ((-((x = y)) & Musician(y)) <-> Love(y, music)))))
exists x.(exists y.(((Musician(x) -> Love(x, music)) & (Love(y, music) -> (-((x = y)) & Musician(y))))))

nl: All customers in James' family who subscribe to AMC A-List are eligible to watch three movies every week without any additional fees.
canonical_fol: all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList)) -> EligibleForThreeFreeMoviesEveryWeekWithoutAdditionalFees(x))

contrastives.fol: all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList)) -> -EligibleForThreeFreeMoviesEveryWeekWithoutAdditionalFees(x))

witness_axioms: exists x.(Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList))

extraction_json.nl: All customers in James' family who subscribe to AMC A-List are eligible to watch three movies every week without any additional fees.

nl: Some of the customers in James' family go to the cinema every week.
canonical_fol: exists x.(exists y.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & GoToEveryWeek(x, cinema) & -(x = y) & Customer(y) & In(y, jameSFamily)) & GoToEveryWeek(y, cinema)))

positives.fol: exists v0.(exists v1.((Customer(v0) & In(v0,jameSFamily) & GoToEveryWeek(v0,cinema) & -(v0 = v1) & Customer(v1) & In(v1,jameSFamily)) & GoToEveryWeek(v1,cinema)))

contrastives.fol: all x.(exists y.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & GoToEveryWeek(x, cinema) & -(x = y) & Customer(y) & In(y, jameSFamily)) & GoToEveryWeek(y, cinema)))

witness_axioms: exists y.exists x.(Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & GoToEveryWeek(x, cinema) & -(x = y) & Customer(y) & In(y, jameSFamily))

extraction_json.nl: Some of the customers in James' family go to the cinema every week.

gold_fol: ∃x ∃y (Customer(x) ∧ In(x, jameSFamily) ∧ GoToEveryWeek(x, cinema) ∧ (¬(x=y)) ∧ Customer(y) ∧ In(y, jameSFamily) ∧ GoToEveryWeek(y, cinema))

nl: Customers in James' family subscribe to AMC A-List or HBO service.

contrastives.fol: all x.((-Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & (SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList) | SubscribedTo(x, hBO))))
all x.((Customer(x) & -In(x, jameSFamily) & (SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList) | SubscribedTo(x, hBO))))
all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & (SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList) & SubscribedTo(x, hBO))))
all x.(-((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & (SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList) | SubscribedTo(x, hBO)))))
all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & -((SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList) | SubscribedTo(x, hBO)))))
all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, hBO)))
all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, aMCAList)))

extraction_json.nl: Customers in James' family subscribe to AMC A-List or HBO service.

nl: Customers in James' family who prefer TV series will not watch TV series in cinemas.

contrastives.fol: all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & Prefer(x, tVSeries)) -> -(-WatchIn(x, tV, cinema)))
all x.((In(x, jameSFamily) & Prefer(x, tVSeries)) -> -(WatchIn(x, tV, cinema)))
all x.((Customer(x) & Prefer(x, tVSeries)) -> -(WatchIn(x, tV, cinema)))
all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily)) -> -(WatchIn(x, tV, cinema)))
all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & Prefer(x, tVSeries)) -> -(-(WatchIn(x, tV, cinema))))

witness_axioms: exists v0.exists v1.exists v2.WatchIn(v0, v1, v2)
exists x.(Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & Prefer(x, tVSeries))

extraction_json.nl: Customers in James' family who prefer TV series will not watch TV series in cinemas.

gold_fol: ∀x ((Customer(x) ∧ In(x, jameSFamily) ∧ Prefer(x, tVSeries)) → (¬WatchIn(x, tV, cinema)))

nl: All customers in James' family who subscribe to HBO services prefer TV series to movies.

contrastives.fol: all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, hBO)) -> -Prefer(x, tVSeries))
all x.((In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, hBO)) -> Prefer(x, tVSeries))
all x.((Customer(x) & SubscribedTo(x, hBO)) -> Prefer(x, tVSeries))
all x.((Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily)) -> Prefer(x, tVSeries))

witness_axioms: exists x.(Customer(x) & In(x, jameSFamily) & SubscribedTo(x, hBO))

extraction_json.nl: All customers in James' family who subscribe to HBO services prefer TV series to movies.

gold_fol: ∀x ((Customer(x) ∧ In(x, jameSFamily) ∧  SubscribedTo(x, hBO)) → Prefer(x, tVSeries))

contrastives.fol: all x.(all y.((LaLigaSoccerTeam(x) & LaLigaSoccerTeam(y) & MorePoints(x, y)) -> -RankHigherThan(x, y)))
all x.(all y.((LaLigaSoccerTeam(y) & MorePoints(x, y)) -> RankHigherThan(x, y)))
all x.(all y.((LaLigaSoccerTeam(x) & MorePoints(x, y)) -> RankHigherThan(x, y)))
all x.(all y.((LaLigaSoccerTeam(x) & LaLigaSoccerTeam(y)) -> RankHigherThan(x, y)))
all x.(-(all y.((LaLigaSoccerTeam(x) & LaLigaSoccerTeam(y) & MorePoints(x, y)) -> RankHigherThan(x, y))))

witness_axioms: exists y.exists x.(LaLigaSoccerTeam(x) & LaLigaSoccerTeam(y) & MorePoints(x, y))

extraction_json.nl: A La Liga soccer team ranks higher than another La Liga soccer team if it receives more points.
